title: senecio echinatus
intro: Senecio echinatus, also known as the Cape daisy or jagged-leaved ragwort, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family native to South Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include its potential to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and dermatitis, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
